achievements.title: Achievements
achievements.pageSubtitle: Milestones you reach as your loyalty program grows.

ladders.stamps: {count, plural, =1 {First stamp given} other {# stamps given}}
ladders.repeatCustomers: {count, plural, =1 {First returning customer} other {# returning customers}}

info.growth: The total number of customers who have ever added your card.
info.engagement: The total number of stamps your team has ever given.
info.momentum: Your last 30 days, always moving forward. Today counts, and anything older than 30 days drops off.
info.loyalty: Customers who come back, counted as loyal once they visit again on another day.
info.firsts: Milestones you earn just once, the first time you reach each one, like your first stamp or first broadcast.
info.weeklyGoal: Stamps your team gives this week. We suggest a target based on your recent weeks, and you can change it anytime.

hero.earnedThisMonth: {count, plural, =1 {1 earned this month} other {# earned this month}}
hero.earnedThisYear: {count, plural, =1 {1 earned this year} other {# earned this year}}

why.growth: Every customer who adds your card. Your reach, growing.
why.engagement: Every stamp is a visit. More stamps, more habit.
why.momentum: Your last 30 days, a rolling window. It rewards a strong recent month.
why.loyalty: Customers who came back on two different days, your regulars.
why.firsts: Milestones you hit the first time you do something.

weeklyGoal.label: This week's goal
weeklyGoal.toGo: {remaining} stamps to go, you've got this.
weeklyGoal.editDescription: The number of stamps you want to reach this week. We suggest {auto}, based on your recent weeks.
